true_desc_levels.1: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to increase own <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\n\nWhen the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to increase own <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\n\nWhen the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to increase own <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\n\nWhen the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to increase own <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\n\nWhen the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase own <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\n\nWhen the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。\n\nこのスキルは自分が<color=#28d9ed>防御力UP</color>を保有している場合、ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPし、防御力が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。\n\nこのスキルは自分が<color=#28d9ed>防御力UP</color>を保有している場合、ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPし、防御力が高いほどダメージがUPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.\n\n이 스킬은 자신이 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color> 증가를 보유하는 동안 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가하고 공격력 대신 방어력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.\n\n이 스킬은 자신이 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color> 증가를 보유하는 동안 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가하고 공격력 대신 방어력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.\n\n이 스킬은 자신이 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color> 증가를 보유하는 동안 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가하고 공격력 대신 방어력에 비례하여 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击2名敌人，以<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的概率使自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>在<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内提升。\n\n持有<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升期间，该技能伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>，且伤害按防御力而非攻击力计算。

SKT_BURST_3.effect: Changed to Enhanced Attack\nDMG Increase\nHealth Recovery 20%

SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 替换为强化攻击\n伤害提升\n生命值恢复20%

true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks an enemy and removes <color=#28d9ed>all</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>AP</color>.
After attacking, increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.

When the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.

When the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.

Attacks an enemy and removes <color=#28d9ed>all</color> of the target's <color=#28d9ed>AP</color>.
After attacking, grants <color=#28d9ed>Invulnerability</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.

When the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, this skill's DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. Damage dealt increases proportional to Defense instead of Attack.

敵にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>AP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>すべて</color>除去する。
攻撃後、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。

このスキルは自分が<color=#28d9ed>防御力UP</color>を保有している場合、ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPし、防御力が高いほどダメージがUPする。

持有<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升期间，该技能伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>，且伤害按防御力而非攻击力计算。

<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>：攻击后夺取目标<color=#28d9ed>1个</color>强化效果。（无视效果抵抗）
持有<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升期间，该技能伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>，且伤害按防御力而非攻击力计算。

SKT_FUSION_PASSIVE.name: Core-Fused Passive
SKT_FUSION_PASSIVE.name_jp: コアフュージョンパッシブ

true_desc_levels.1: Increases DMG dealt by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> when the caster has an elemental advantage.
true_desc_levels.2: Increases DMG dealt by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> when the caster has an elemental advantage.\nAll of the caster's attacks are treated as having elemental advantage.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 有利属性の攻撃判定で敵に与えるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 有利属性の敵に与えるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。\nすべての攻撃が有利属性の攻撃判定でダメージを与える。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 유리한 상성의 적에게 주는 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 유리한 상성의 적에게 주는 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.\n자신의 모든 공격이 유리한 상성으로 적용됩니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 对属性不利的敌人造成的伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 对属性不利的敌人造成的伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。\n自身所有攻击以克制属性生效。

2: All attacks apply with an elemental advantage
2_jp: すべて有利属性の攻撃判定でダメージを与える。
2_zh: 所有攻击以克制属性生效
